zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Manrique de Lara於1155年出生在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉納拉時，她的父親Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona46歲，母親Ermesenda de Narbona45歲。她和Diego López de Haro II至少有1個兒子。她去世於1184年在西班牙享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Manrique de Lara于1155年出生在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉納拉时，她的父亲Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona46岁，母亲Ermesenda de Narbona45岁。她和Diego López de Haro II至少有1个儿子。她去世于1184年在西班牙享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Manrique
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Luis, Juan, Jose, Fernando, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Mario, Raul, Roberto, Ruben.
Spanish: possibly from the Occitan personal name Aimeric (insouthern France), composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim‘homeland, village’ + rīc ‘power’.

variants.name: Manriquez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Roberto, Ruben, Jesus, Carlos, Rafael, Sergio, Armando, Felipe, Juan, Manuel, Alberto.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Carlos, Jorge, Luis, Pedro, Jesus, Roberto, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Lara de los Infantes in Burgos province. Compare   De Lara  .

variants.name: De Lara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Jose, Luis, Mauricio, Pedro, Alfonso, Ana, Jaime, Javier, Jorge, Merlinda.
Spanish: variant, with the preposition de ‘from’, of Lara .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Manrique de Lara was born in 1155, in Nájera, Nájera, La Rioja, Spain, her father, Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona, was 46 and her mother, Ermesenda de Narbona, was 45. She had at least 1 son with Diego López de Haro II. She died in 1184, in Spain, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Manrique de Lara est née en 1155, à Nájera, Nájera, La Rioja, Espagne, son père, Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Ermesenda de Narbona, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Diego López de Haro II. Elle est décédée en 1184, à Espagne, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Manrique de Lara 1155 in Nájera, Nájera, La Rioja, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona 46 und ihre Mutter Ermesenda de Narbona 45. Sie hatte mit Diego López de Haro II mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1184 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Manrique de Lara è nata il nel 1155 nel Nájera, Nájera, La Rioja, Spagna, sua padre, Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Ermesenda de Narbona, aveva 45 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Diego López de Haro II. Morì nel 1184, nel Spagna, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Manrique de Laraが1155年にスペインラ リオジャンaジャーアンaジャーアで生まれた時，父Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbonaは46歳，母Ermesenda de Narbonaは45歳であった。彼女はDiego López de Haro IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1184年にスペインで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Manrique de Lara(이)가 1155년 스페인 라 리오자 aj라 aj라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermesenda de Narbona(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Diego López de Haro II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1184년 스페인에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Manrique de Lara nasceu em 1155, em Nájera, Nájera, La Rioja, Espanha, seu pai, Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Ermesenda de Narbona, tinha 45 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Diego López de Haro II. Ela faleceu em 1184, em Espanha, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Manrique de Lara родилась в 1155 г. в местности нaджира, нaджира, ла риоджа, Испания, её отцу по имени Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermesenda de Narbona, 45. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Diego López de Haro II. Она умерла в 1184 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Manrique de Lara nació en 1155, en Nájera, Nájera, La Rioja, España, su papá, Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Ermesenda de Narbona, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Diego López de Haro II. Murió en 1184, en España, a la edad de 29 años.
